subject: New Opening: Machine Learning Engineer – AI/ML
body:
Hello,

Quick note – new opening:

Senior Machine Learning Engineer @ Vaultix
Start: 2023-10-25 | Duration: 6m
Stack: AI/ML, AWS, Kubernetes, Oracle, PyTorch, OpenAI API
Rate: 1000 SEK/h
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)

Ping me if you have someone available!

/Maria Svensson, Konsult Partners
+46 70 567 89 01
